page_metadata.biotools__summary: A tool for non-coding genomic regions functional enrichment analysis based on Regulatory Elements Gene Ontology Annotation (RE-GOA). Resources for RE-GOA in mouse and human are availible.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A tool for non-coding genomic regions functional enrichment analysis based on Regulatory Elements Gene Ontology Annotation (RE-GOA). Resources for RE-GOA in mouse and human are availible.
